_instructions: Copy this file to userdata/recipe_map.json and edit to match your recipes.
Keys are recipe slugs (from the Mealie URL, e.g. /g/home/r/my-recipe-slug).
All tags must exist in userdata/taxonomy.json.
All categories must exist in userdata/taxonomy.json.
Run step 1 (audit) to dump all your recipe slugs for easy reference.
Run step 3 (apply) to push changes — missing tags/categories are auto-created.
